papers.title: Photoswitchable Isomers for Grain Boundary Resilience and Light Cycling Stability
papers.title_cn: 光开关异构体实现晶界韧性和光照循环稳定性
papers.authors: Southeastheast University, Henan University, Helmholtz-Zentrum Berlin, University of Stuttgart, Xiamen University
papers.abstract: Researchers introduced photoswitchable azobenzene derivative Ca-Abz at grain boundaries, acting as 'molecular spring' to dynamically dissipate stress from lattice expansion/contraction during light cycling. Achieved 27.2% PCE (certified 26.7%), with >95% retention after 2,000h under UV-containing light cycling at 65°C.
papers.synthesis_method: Ca-Abz photoswitchable molecule integration at grain boundaries via carboxyl-Pb coordination
papers.stability: >95% retention after 2,000h light cycling (65°C with UV); 95.7% after 500 thermal cycles (-40°C to +85°C)
papers.significance: Introduces new material design concept for addressing dynamic stress damage under real-world outdoor conditions

papers.title: All-Perovskite Four-Terminal Spectral Splitting Solar Cells of 30% PCE with FAPbI3 Wide-Bandgap Perovskite
papers.title_cn: 基于FAPbI3宽带隙钙钛矿的全钙钛矿四端光谱分束叠层电池实现30%效率
papers.abstract: Japanese researchers fabricated all-perovskite tandem cells using FAPbI3 nanoparticles and spectral splitting architecture. The 4T device combines 24.4% wide-bandgap top cell with 21.5% narrow-bandgap bottom cell, achieving 30.2% efficiency. Dichroic mirrors enable optimal wavelength separation for each subcell.
papers.synthesis_method: FAPbI3 nanoparticles synthesized via hot injection method; two-step spin-coating process; spectral splitting 4T configuration
papers.stability: FAPbI3 phase stability addressed via nanoparticle synthesis approach
papers.significance: Demonstrates viable pathway for all-perovskite tandems with simplified architecture flexibility

papers.title: Defect Networks as Charge Highways in Lead-Halide Perovskites
papers.title_cn: 铅卤钙钛矿中缺陷网络作为电荷超高速公路
papers.authors: Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA)
papers.abstract: ISTA researchers discovered that structural defects in perovskites actually help rather than harm. Domain walls form interconnected networks that separate and guide electrical charges efficiently, acting as 'highways' for charge carriers. Using silver ion markers, they visualized these internal structures, providing first physical explanation for perovskite efficiency.
papers.synthesis_method: Nonlinear optical techniques for charge injection; silver ion diffusion for domain wall visualization
papers.stability: Fundamental understanding enables future internal structure engineering for efficiency improvement
papers.significance: Resolves long-standing debate on perovskite efficiency mechanism; opens new research direction for internal structure engineering

papers.title: Cesium-Doping Strategy with Novel Organo-Cesium Salt for Stable High-Efficiency Perovskite Solar Cells
papers.title_cn: 新型有机铯盐铯掺杂策略实现稳定高效钙钛矿太阳能电池
papers.abstract: Researchers designed 4-(diphenylphosphino)benzoic acid cesium (CsDPPBA) as a novel organo-cesium salt to achieve efficient Cs+ doping and uniform cation distribution in FAPb1-xCsxPbI3. This strategy enables high-quality films with improved phase stability. Certified efficiency reached 26.61%, with 95% retention after 1,500h at 85°C.
papers.synthesis_method: Two-step Cs+ doping using novel CsDPPBA organo-cesium salt; controlled phase transition via amorphous mixed-halide intermediate
papers.stability: 95% retention after 1,500h continuous operation at 85°C;阐明了相变路径和Cs+驱动的晶格稳定机制
papers.significance: Provides new思路 for Cs+ doping and addresses phase stability challenges in FAPbI3-based perovskites

papers.title: Bulk Nano-Heterojunction Architecture for High-Efficiency and Stable Perovskite Solar Cells
papers.title_cn: 体相纳米异质界面架构实现高效稳定钙钛矿太阳能电池
papers.abstract: ZJU research team introduced SiOx nanoparticles as scaffolds to transform planar interfaces into 3D intertwined bulk nano-heterojunction structures. The Py3 molecules form strong covalent bonds (P-O-Si, -10.89 eV binding energy) with SiOx, fundamentally preventing molecular disorganization. Achieved 26.5% PCE (certified 26.3%), retaining 98% initial efficiency after 2,500h MPP tracking at 60°C.
papers.synthesis_method: SiOx nanoparticle scaffold forming 3D bulk nano-heterojunction with Py3 molecules via P-O-Si covalent bonds
papers.stability: 98% retention after 2,500h MPP at 60°C; >99% after 2,000h at 65°C under continuous illumination; 23.0% on 32.5 cm² modules via blade coating
papers.significance: First demonstration of unified high efficiency and long lifetime at near-commercialization level; breaks efficiency-stability trade-off

papers.title: New approach to solar cell manufacture: contact-triggered cationic interaction (CCI)
papers.title_cn: 接触触发阳离子相互作用实现钙钛矿电池效率与稳定性同步提升
papers.abstract: Researchers demonstrated that simply placing two perovskite films in contact triggers molecular interactions that reorganize crystal structure throughout the material depth. This contact-triggered cationic interaction (CCI) approach achieved certified 25.61% PCE. The treated material requires approximately twice the thermal energy to degrade compared to recent literature, representing significant stability improvement.
papers.synthesis_method: Contact-triggered cationic interaction (CCI) by physical contact between two perovskite films
papers.stability: Treated material requires ~2x thermal energy to degrade; charge carrier lifetime increased from 4.48 to 5.89 μs
papers.significance: Simple physical contact reorganizes material at molecular level without adding any chemicals or complexity

papers.title: Crystal-solvate pre-seeded synthesis for scalable perovskite solar cell fabrication
papers.title_cn: 晶体溶剂化物预成核策略实现可扩展钙钛矿太阳能电池制备
papers.authors: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Chinese Academy of Sciences
papers.abstract: HKUST researchers developed a crystal-solvate (CSV) seeding strategy with slow-release solvent function to address buried interface defects. Solvent molecules encapsulated within crystal lattice are gradually released during annealing, enabling gentle interfacial crystallization control. Achieved 26.13% PCE with 86.75% fill factor, and 23.15% efficiency on 49.91 cm² large-area devices, demonstrating minimal trans-scale efficiency loss.
papers.synthesis_method: Crystal-solvate seeding with low-dimensional CSV materials as buried-interface nucleation layers; slow-release solvent regulation during annealing
papers.stability: Enhanced operational stability under light and heat stress compared to control devices
papers.significance: Provides scalable manufacturing pathway by controlling buried interfacial microstructure from crystallization origin

papers.title: Three Papers Published in Nature Energy: JinkoSolar's Breakthroughs in TOPCon/Perovskite Tandem Technology
papers.title_cn: 晶科能源在TOPCon/钙钛矿叠层技术领域取得突破，三篇论文发表于Nature Energy
papers.authors: JinkoSolar, Ningbo Institute of Materials Technology and Engineering, Soochow University, National University of Singapore
papers.abstract: JinkoSolar, in collaboration with research institutions, developed three major breakthroughs: (1) Industrial-scale TOPCon cells achieving 26.66% certified efficiency; (2) Monolithic perovskite/TOPCon tandem cells with 32.73% certified efficiency and 1,961 V open-circuit voltage, maintaining 80% initial efficiency after 2,000 hours; (3) Using dual-mode-coupled ligand (MBT) to regulate FA+ crystallization kinetics, achieving 32.76% certified efficiency with 91% retention after 1,700 hours operation.
papers.synthesis_method: Additive-assisted perovskite crystallization on industrial TOPCon silicon
papers.significance: Provides scalable and industrially compatible pathway for perovskite/crystalline silicon tandem technology

papers.title: Strongly Spatial-Confined Self-Assembled Monolayers for High-Performance Perovskite Photovoltaics
papers.title_cn: 强空间限域自组装单分子层用于高性能钙钛矿光伏器件
papers.authors: Southern University of Science and Technology, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
papers.abstract: Researchers developed multidimensional spatial confinement strategy using custom molecule MeO-PABDCB with rigid phenylene backbone. The molecular lock architecture suppresses molecular desorption and disorder while improving perovskite film quality. Devices achieved 26.54% PCE with 86.4% fill factor, retaining ~90% initial efficiency after 1,000 hours continuous operation and 250 thermal cycles.
papers.synthesis_method: Custom SAM molecule design with rigid phenylene backbone for multidimensional spatial confinement
papers.stability: ~90% retention after 1,000h operation; 94% after 250 thermal cycles (-40 to 85°C)
papers.significance: Establishes spatial confinement as general molecular design principle for stabilizing ultra-thin functional interfaces

papers.title: Perovskite-silicon Tandem Solar Cells: The Next Leap in Ultra-Efficient Solar Power
papers.title_cn: 钙钛矿-硅叠层太阳能电池：超高效率太阳能的下一跃升
papers.abstract: Comprehensive review of perovskite-silicon tandem solar cells progress toward commercialization. Discusses efficiency milestones (>30% certified), stability improvements, key challenges including long-term durability and lead toxicity, and market outlook. Oxford PV, LONGi, and Chinese manufacturers have announced pilot-line products. Commercial targets set for 26-28% module efficiency in late 2020s.
papers.synthesis_method: Review of various deposition techniques including solution processing and vacuum evaporation
papers.stability: Thousands of hours demonstrated in lab conditions
papers.significance: Provides comprehensive outlook on commercialization pathway and remaining challenges

papers.title: Bifacial Tunnel Oxide Passivating Contacts for Silicon and Perovskite-Silicon Tandem Solar Cells with Improved Efficiency
papers.title_cn: 双面隧穿氧化物钝化接触用于硅及钙钛矿-硅叠层太阳能电池
papers.abstract: Developed full-size bifacial TOPCon crystalline silicon solar cell (26.34% certified) with innovative patterned n-type TOPCon finger contacts on front surface. Fabricated monolithic perovskite/TOPCon tandem cell achieving 32.73% certified efficiency and 1.961 V open-circuit voltage with excellent long-term stability (80% retention after 2,000 hours).
papers.synthesis_method: Patterned n-type TOPCon finger contacts with full-area p-type TOPCon on back
papers.stability: 80% initial efficiency retention after 2,000 hours continuous operation
papers.significance: Sets new performance record for perovskite/TOPCon tandem cells; provides scalable industrial pathway

papers.title: Dual-side Electrical Refinement Enables Efficient Industrial Tunnel Oxide Passivating Contact Silicon Solar Cells
papers.title_cn: 双面电学优化实现高效工业级隧穿氧化物钝化接触硅太阳能电池
papers.authors: JinkoSolar, Ningbo Institute of Materials Technology and Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences
papers.abstract: Achieved certified efficiency of 26.66% on M10-sized silicon wafers, setting new record for industrial-scale TOPCon cells. Key innovations include high-resistance boron emitter on front side, optimized fine-line grid design, and innovative double-layer tunneling SiO2/polysilicon structure on rear side. Achieved Voc of 744.6 mV, FF of 85.57%, and bifaciality of 88.3%.
papers.synthesis_method: Dual-sided electrical synergy optimization with localized polysilicon thinning technology
papers.significance: Narrows gap between industrial TOPCon cells and theoretical efficiency limit (29.4%)

papers.title: Additive-Assisted Perovskite Crystallization on Industrial TOPCon Silicon for Tandem Solar Cells with Improved Efficiency
papers.title_cn: 添加剂辅助钙钛矿结晶用于高效工业级TOPCon硅基叠层太阳能电池
papers.authors: JinkoSolar, National University of Singapore et al.
papers.abstract: Addressed rapid perovskite crystallization challenge on industrial thin silicon substrates using dual-mode-coupled ligand (MBT) to regulate major organic cation (FA+) crystallization kinetics. Achieved certified 32.76% efficiency (NPVM certified), approaching current tandem efficiency record. Cell maintained 91% initial efficiency after 1,700 hours continuous operation.
papers.synthesis_method: Dual-mode-coupled ligand (MBT) additive for controlled FA+ crystallization on industrial TOPCon
papers.significance: Bridges laboratory perovskite materials with market-dominant TOPCon silicon technology

papers.title: GW级钙钛矿正式量产：光伏四大赛道洗牌，谁能领跑
papers.title_cn: GW-level Perovskite Mass Production: Competition in Four Major PV Technology Tracks
papers.abstract: Global first GW-level perovskite tandem production line achieved small-batch mass production in March 2026. GCL Integration's Kunshan facility operates at 26.5-28% efficiency with >98% yield. Plans to scale to 5GW by end of 2026. Longi achieved 34.85% lab efficiency. Market shows severe undersupply with demand 8-13GW vs supply 3-5GW.
papers.significance: Marks official entry into perovskite tandem commercialization era

papers.title: 中国钙钛矿电池技术大会发布重磅成果：国产钙钛矿/晶硅叠层电池效率突破35%
papers.title_cn: China Perovskite Solar Cell Technology Conference: Domestic Perovskite/Silicon Tandem Efficiency Exceeds 35%
papers.abstract: At the 2026 China Perovskite Battery Technology Conference in Suzhou, domestic perovskite/silicon tandem cells achieved 35% lab efficiency, surpassing traditional silicon cell efficiency ceiling of ~26%. Key challenges remaining: mass production stability and operational lifetime. Multiple leading companies advancing pilot line construction.
papers.stability: Focus on addressing mass production stability challenges
papers.significance: Demonstrates China's leading position in perovskite tandem research

papers.title: Perovskite Solar Cell Outdoor Test Achieves Near-Zero Degradation After Six Months
papers.title_cn: 钙钛矿太阳能电池户外实证：连续运行半年功率几乎零衰减
papers.abstract: Zhejiang University research team developed 'carrier nanocache' structure using core-shell silicon nitride nanoparticles at buried interface. Large-area component (1200+ cm²) operated continuously for 6 months in Beijing outdoor environment with negligible power degradation, while unmodified component showed 67% degradation. Small cells retained 95% efficiency after 3,000 hours MPP tracking.
papers.synthesis_method: Core-shell α-Si3N4 nanoparticles with ~1.5 nm amorphous shell introduced at buried interface
papers.stability: Near-zero degradation after 6 months outdoor operation; 95% retention after 3,000h MPP tracking
papers.significance: Bridges lab-to-real-environment gap; demonstrates viable pathway for engineering-stable perovskite devices
